---
title: "Pheast_Medulloblastoma"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Loading in Data set

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(httr2)
library(jsonlite)
library(survival)
library(survminer)

base_url <- "https://cbioportal-api.ccdi.cancer.gov/api"
study_id <- "openpedcan_v15"

expr_profile_id <- "openpedcan_v15_rna_seq_v2_mrna"
sample_list_id <- "openpedcan_v15_rna_seq_v2_mrna"
```

```{r}
#### Pull CD24 expression from OpenPedCan

cd24_entrez <- 100133941

cd24_expr <- request(
  paste0(
    base_url,
    "/molecular-profiles/",
    expr_profile_id,
    "/molecular-data/fetch"
  )
) %>%
  req_method("POST") %>%
  req_body_json(
    list(
      entrezGeneIds = list(cd24_entrez),
      sampleListId = sample_list_id
    )
  ) %>%
  req_perform() %>%
  resp_body_json(simplifyVector = TRUE) %>%
  as_tibble()

cd24_expr_clean <- cd24_expr %>%
  transmute(
    sampleId = sampleId,
    patientId = patientId,
    CD24_expr = as.numeric(value)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(CD24_expr))

head(cd24_expr_clean)
summary(cd24_expr_clean$CD24_expr)
nrow(cd24_expr_clean)
```

```{r}
#### Pull OpenPedCan clinical data

openped_clinical_sample <- request(
  paste0(base_url, "/studies/", study_id, "/clinical-data")
) %>%
  req_url_query(
    clinicalDataType = "SAMPLE",
    projection = "DETAILED"
  ) %>%
  req_perform() %>%
  resp_body_json(simplifyVector = TRUE) %>%
  as_tibble()

openped_clinical_patient <- request(
  paste0(base_url, "/studies/", study_id, "/clinical-data")
) %>%
  req_url_query(
    clinicalDataType = "PATIENT",
    projection = "DETAILED"
  ) %>%
  req_perform() %>%
  resp_body_json(simplifyVector = TRUE) %>%
  as_tibble()

openped_clinical_sample_wide <- openped_clinical_sample %>%
  select(sampleId, patientId, clinicalAttributeId, value) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = clinicalAttributeId,
    values_from = value,
    values_fn = list(value = dplyr::first)
  )

openped_clinical_patient_wide <- openped_clinical_patient %>%
  select(patientId, clinicalAttributeId, value) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = clinicalAttributeId,
    values_from = value,
    values_fn = list(value = dplyr::first)
  )

openped_clinical <- openped_clinical_sample_wide %>%
  left_join(
    openped_clinical_patient_wide,
    by = "patientId"
  )

colnames(openped_clinical)[
  str_detect(
    colnames(openped_clinical),
    regex("AGE|OS|SURV|DEATH|VITAL|STATUS|MONTH|CANCER|DIAG", ignore_case = TRUE)
  )
]
```

```{r}
#### OpenPedCan Medulloblastoma: Merge CD24 + Clinical

openped_cd24_surv <- cd24_expr_clean %>%
  left_join(openped_clinical, by = c("sampleId", "patientId"))

openped_medullo_cd24 <- openped_cd24_surv %>%
  mutate(
    age_years = as.numeric(AGE),
    cancer_type = CANCER_TYPE_DETAILED,
    os_months = as.numeric(OS_MONTHS),
    os_event = case_when(
      str_detect(str_to_upper(OS_STATUS), "DECEASED|DEAD|1:") ~ 1,
      str_detect(str_to_upper(OS_STATUS), "LIVING|ALIVE|0:") ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(
    str_detect(cancer_type, regex("medulloblastoma", ignore_case = TRUE)),
    !is.na(age_years),
    age_years <= 21,
    !is.na(CD24_expr),
    !is.na(os_months),
    !is.na(os_event)
  )

openped_medullo_cd24 %>%
  summarise(
    n_samples = n(),
    n_patients = n_distinct(patientId),
    deaths = sum(os_event == 1),
    alive_censored = sum(os_event == 0),
    min_age = min(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_age = median(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_age = max(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_os_months = median(os_months, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_CD24 = median(CD24_expr, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

table(openped_medullo_cd24$cancer_type)
table(openped_medullo_cd24$os_event)
```

#### Filter:

```{r}
#### OpenPedCan Medulloblastoma: Merge CD24 + Clinical (Age <= 21 only)

openped_cd24_surv <- cd24_expr_clean %>%
  left_join(openped_clinical, by = c("sampleId", "patientId"))

openped_medullo_cd24 <- openped_cd24_surv %>%
  mutate(
    age_years = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(AGE)),
    
    cancer_type = CANCER_TYPE_DETAILED,
    
    os_months = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(OS_MONTHS)),
    
    os_event = case_when(
      str_detect(str_to_upper(OS_STATUS), "DECEASED|DEAD|1:") ~ 1,
      str_detect(str_to_upper(OS_STATUS), "LIVING|ALIVE|0:") ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(
    str_detect(
      cancer_type,
      regex("medulloblastoma", ignore_case = TRUE)
    ),
    
    !is.na(age_years),
    age_years <= 21,
    
    !is.na(CD24_expr),
    !is.na(os_months),
    !is.na(os_event)
  )

openped_medullo_cd24 %>%
  summarise(
    n_samples = n(),
    n_patients = n_distinct(patientId),
    deaths = sum(os_event == 1),
    alive_censored = sum(os_event == 0),
    
    min_age = min(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_age = median(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_age = mean(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_age = max(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    median_os_months = median(os_months, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_CD24 = median(CD24_expr, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

openped_medullo_cd24 %>%
  arrange(desc(age_years)) %>%
  select(
    sampleId,
    patientId,
    age_years,
    cancer_type,
    os_months,
    os_event,
    CD24_expr
  ) %>%
  head(20)
```

```{r}
#### OpenPedCan Medulloblastoma: CD24 High vs Low

openped_medullo_cd24 <- openped_medullo_cd24 %>%
  mutate(
    CD24_group = if_else(
      CD24_expr >= median(CD24_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
      "CD24 High tumors",
      "CD24 Low tumors"
    ),
    CD24_group = factor(
      CD24_group,
      levels = c("CD24 Low tumors", "CD24 High tumors")
    )
  )

openped_medullo_cd24 %>%
  dplyr::count(CD24_group)

openped_medullo_cd24 %>%
  group_by(CD24_group) %>%
  summarise(
    n_samples = n(),
    n_patients = n_distinct(patientId),
    deaths = sum(os_event == 1),
    alive_censored = sum(os_event == 0),
    median_age = median(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_os_months = median(os_months, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_CD24 = median(CD24_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
#### OpenPedCan Medulloblastoma: CD24 KM
#### Simple version: no switching/reordering tricks

library(dplyr)
library(survival)
library(survminer)

# Recreate CD24 groups directly from expression
openped_medullo_cd24 <- openped_medullo_cd24 %>%
  mutate(
    CD24_group = if_else(
      CD24_expr >= median(CD24_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
      "CD24 High tumors",
      "CD24 Low tumors"
    ),
    CD24_group = factor(
      CD24_group,
      levels = c("CD24 Low tumors", "CD24 High tumors")
    )
  )

# Check that the grouping is correct
openped_medullo_cd24 %>%
  group_by(CD24_group) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    median_CD24 = median(CD24_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_CD24 = min(CD24_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_CD24 = max(CD24_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Fit KM model
medullo_fit <- survfit(
  Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ CD24_group,
  data = openped_medullo_cd24
)

# Log-rank test
medullo_logrank <- survdiff(
  Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ CD24_group,
  data = openped_medullo_cd24
)

medullo_logrank_p <- 1 - pchisq(
  medullo_logrank$chisq,
  df = length(medullo_logrank$n) - 1
)

# Plot
# Because factor levels are:
# 1 = CD24 Low tumors
# 2 = CD24 High tumors
# palette must be:
# 1 = black, 2 = pink
medullo_km <- ggsurvplot(
  medullo_fit,
  data = openped_medullo_cd24,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  risk.table.title = "Number at risk",
  risk.table.height = 0.35,
  pval = paste0("Log-rank p = ", signif(medullo_logrank_p, 3)),
  pval.coord = c(10, 0.10),
  conf.int = FALSE,
  palette = c("black", "#FF1493"),
  legend.title = "",
  legend.labs = c(
    "CD24 Low tumors",
    "CD24 High tumors"
  ),
  xlab = "Overall Survival (Months)",
  ylab = "Overall Survival Probability",
  ggtheme = theme_classic(base_size = 16),
  risk.table.y.text = TRUE,
  risk.table.y.text.col = FALSE,
  risk.table.fontsize = 5,
  tables.theme = theme_classic(base_size = 15)
)

medullo_km$table <- medullo_km$table +
  labs(x = "Overall Survival (Months)") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 5, r = 20, b = 5, l = 120)
  )

medullo_km

# Save
png(
  "OpenPedCan_medulloblastoma_CD24_KM_age21under.png",
  width = 2200,
  height = 1600,
  res = 200
)

print(medullo_km)

dev.off()

medullo_logrank_p
```

```{r}
#### OpenPedCan Medulloblastoma: CD24 KM
#### Low = black, High = pink
#### Age <= 21 only

library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(survival)
library(survminer)
library(ggplot2)

# Prepare KM data
openped_medullo_cd24 <- openped_medullo_cd24 %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(age_years),
    age_years <= 21,
    !is.na(CD24_expr),
    !is.na(os_months),
    !is.na(os_event)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    CD24_group = if_else(
      CD24_expr >= median(CD24_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
      "CD24 High tumors",
      "CD24 Low tumors"
    ),
    CD24_group = factor(
      CD24_group,
      levels = c("CD24 Low tumors", "CD24 High tumors")
    )
  )

# Check that CD24 High really has higher expression
openped_medullo_cd24 %>%
  group_by(CD24_group) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    n_patients = n_distinct(patientId),
    median_CD24 = median(CD24_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_CD24 = min(CD24_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_CD24 = max(CD24_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
    deaths = sum(os_event == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    alive_censored = sum(os_event == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Fit KM model
medullo_fit <- survfit(
  Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ CD24_group,
  data = openped_medullo_cd24
)

# Check strata order
names(medullo_fit$strata)

# Log-rank test
medullo_logrank <- survdiff(
  Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ CD24_group,
  data = openped_medullo_cd24
)

medullo_logrank_p <- 1 - pchisq(
  medullo_logrank$chisq,
  df = length(medullo_logrank$n) - 1
)

# KM plot
# Factor order is Low, High
# Therefore palette order is black, pink
medullo_km <- ggsurvplot(
  medullo_fit,
  data = openped_medullo_cd24,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  risk.table.title = "Number at risk",
  risk.table.height = 0.35,
  pval = paste0("Log-rank p = ", signif(medullo_logrank_p, 3)),
  pval.coord = c(10, 0.10),
  conf.int = FALSE,
  palette = c("black", "#FF1493"),
  legend.title = "",
  legend.labs = c(
    "CD24 Low tumors",
    "CD24 High tumors"
  ),
  xlab = "Overall Survival (Months)",
  ylab = "Overall Survival Probability",
  ggtheme = theme_classic(base_size = 16),
  risk.table.y.text = TRUE,
  risk.table.y.text.col = TRUE,
  risk.table.fontsize = 5,
  tables.theme = theme_classic(base_size = 15)
)

# Only adjust spacing/axis size.
# Do NOT manually recolor or relabel the risk table.
medullo_km$table <- medullo_km$table +
  labs(x = "Overall Survival (Months)") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 5, r = 20, b = 5, l = 120)
  )

medullo_km

# Save figure
png(
  "OpenPedCan_medulloblastoma_CD24_KM_age21under_2.png",
  width = 2200,
  height = 1600,
  res = 200
)

print(medullo_km)

dev.off()

# Print p-value
medullo_logrank_p

# Optional: directly verify risk table values
medullo_km_check <- summary(
  medullo_fit,
  times = c(0, 50, 100, 150, 200, 250)
)

data.frame(
  strata = medullo_km_check$strata,
  time = medullo_km_check$time,
  n_risk = medullo_km_check$n.risk,
  n_event = medullo_km_check$n.event,
  n_censor = medullo_km_check$n.censor
)
```

Correlation analysis:

```{r}
#### OpenPedCan Medulloblastoma: Cox Model

medullo_cox <- coxph(
  Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ CD24_expr,
  data = openped_medullo_cd24
)

summary(medullo_cox)
```

```{r}
#### OpenPedCan Medulloblastoma: CD24 Correlation with OS

medullo_pearson <- cor.test(
  openped_medullo_cd24$CD24_expr,
  openped_medullo_cd24$os_months,
  method = "pearson"
)

medullo_spearman <- cor.test(
  openped_medullo_cd24$CD24_expr,
  openped_medullo_cd24$os_months,
  method = "spearman"
)

medullo_pearson
medullo_spearman
```

```{r}
#### OpenPedCan Medulloblastoma: CD24 vs OS Scatter Plot

ggplot(
  openped_medullo_cd24,
  aes(x = CD24_expr, y = os_months)
) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5, alpha = 0.75) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
  labs(
    x = "CD24 Expression",
    y = "Overall Survival (Months)"
  )

ggsave(
  "OpenPedCan_medulloblastoma_CD24_vs_OS_months_age21under.png",
  width = 7,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)
```

#### OPENPBTA:

```{r}
#### List all OpenPBTA files

openpbta_dir <- "openpbta (1)"

openpbta_files <- list.files(
  openpbta_dir,
  recursive = TRUE,
  full.names = TRUE
)

openpbta_files
```

```{r}
#### Load OpenPBTA Expression + Clinical Data

library(tidyverse)
library(survival)
library(survminer)

openpbta_dir <- "openpbta (1)"

openpbta_expr <- read_tsv(
  file.path(
    openpbta_dir,
    "data_mrna_expression_continuous_rna_seq_v2_mrna.txt"
  ),
  comment = "#"
)

openpbta_sample_attr <- read_tsv(
  file.path(
    openpbta_dir,
    "data_clinical_sample_attributes.txt"
  ),
  comment = "#"
)

openpbta_patient_attr <- read_tsv(
  file.path(
    openpbta_dir,
    "data_clinical_patient_attributes.txt"
  ),
  comment = "#"
)

dim(openpbta_expr)
dim(openpbta_sample_attr)
dim(openpbta_patient_attr)
```

```{r}
#### Find clinical files

openpbta_files[
  str_detect(
    openpbta_files,
    regex(
      "clinical|histolog|metadata|sample|patient|survival",
      ignore_case = TRUE
    )
  )
]
```

```{r}
#### OpenPBTA: Check CD24 Availability

grep(
  "^CD24$",
  openpbta_expr$Hugo_Symbol,
  value = TRUE
)

openpbta_expr %>%
  filter(
    Hugo_Symbol == "CD24"
  ) %>%
  select(1:10)
```

```{r}
#### OpenPBTA: Extract CD24 Expression

openpbta_cd24_expr <- openpbta_expr %>%
  filter(
    Hugo_Symbol == "CD24"
  ) %>%
  select(
    -Hugo_Symbol,
    -Entrez_Gene_Id
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(),
    names_to = "sampleId",
    values_to = "CD24_expr"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    CD24_expr = as.numeric(CD24_expr)
  )

openpbta_cd24_expr

summary(openpbta_cd24_expr$CD24_expr)
```

```{r}
#### OpenPBTA: Check Clinical Columns

colnames(openpbta_sample_attr)

colnames(openpbta_patient_attr)

grep(
  "OS|SURV|STATUS|AGE|DIAG|HIST|TUMOR|MEDULLO|GROUP|SUBTYPE",
  colnames(openpbta_patient_attr),
  value = TRUE,
  ignore.case = TRUE
)

grep(
  "OS|SURV|STATUS|AGE|DIAG|HIST|TUMOR|MEDULLO|GROUP|SUBTYPE",
  colnames(openpbta_sample_attr),
  value = TRUE,
  ignore.case = TRUE
)
```

```{r}
#### OpenPBTA Medulloblastoma: Merge CD24 + Clinical (Age <= 21)

openpbta_clinical <- openpbta_sample_attr %>%
  left_join(
    openpbta_patient_attr,
    by = "PATIENT_ID"
  )

openpbta_medullo_cd24 <- openpbta_cd24_expr %>%
  left_join(
    openpbta_clinical,
    by = c("sampleId" = "SAMPLE_ID")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    age_years = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(AGE)),
    
    os_months = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(OS_MONTHS)),
    
    os_event = case_when(
      str_detect(str_to_upper(OS_STATUS), "DECEASED|DEAD|1:") ~ 1,
      str_detect(str_to_upper(OS_STATUS), "LIVING|ALIVE|0:") ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(
    str_detect(
      paste(
        CANCER_TYPE,
        CANCER_TYPE_DETAILED,
        HISTOLOGY,
        PATHOLOGY_FREE_TEXT_DIAGNOSIS
      ),
      regex("medulloblastoma", ignore_case = TRUE)
    ),
    
    !is.na(age_years),
    age_years <= 21,
    
    !is.na(CD24_expr),
    !is.na(os_months),
    !is.na(os_event)
  )

openpbta_medullo_cd24 %>%
  summarise(
    n_samples = n(),
    n_patients = n_distinct(PATIENT_ID),
    
    deaths = sum(os_event == 1),
    alive_censored = sum(os_event == 0),
    
    min_age = min(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_age = median(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_age = max(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    median_os_months = median(os_months, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_CD24 = median(CD24_expr, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

table(openpbta_medullo_cd24$CANCER_TYPE)

table(openpbta_medullo_cd24$CANCER_TYPE_DETAILED)

table(openpbta_medullo_cd24$HISTOLOGY)

table(openpbta_medullo_cd24$os_event)

range(openpbta_medullo_cd24$age_years, na.rm = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#### OpenPBTA Medulloblastoma: CD24 High vs Low

openpbta_medullo_cd24 <- openpbta_medullo_cd24 %>%
  mutate(
    CD24_group = if_else(
      CD24_expr >= median(CD24_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
      "CD24 High tumors",
      "CD24 Low tumors"
    ),
    CD24_group = factor(
      CD24_group,
      levels = c("CD24 Low tumors", "CD24 High tumors")
    )
  )

openpbta_medullo_cd24 %>%
  dplyr::count(CD24_group)
```

```{r}
 #### OpenPBTA Medulloblastoma: CD24 KM

openpbta_medullo_cd24 <- openpbta_medullo_cd24 %>%
  mutate(
    CD24_group = case_when(
      str_detect(as.character(CD24_group), "Low") ~ "CD24 Low tumors",
      str_detect(as.character(CD24_group), "High") ~ "CD24 High tumors",
      TRUE ~ as.character(CD24_group)
    ),
    CD24_group = factor(
      CD24_group,
      levels = c("CD24 Low tumors", "CD24 High tumors")
    )
  )

openpbta_medullo_fit <- survfit(
  Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ CD24_group,
  data = openpbta_medullo_cd24
)

openpbta_medullo_logrank <- survdiff(
  Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ CD24_group,
  data = openpbta_medullo_cd24
)

openpbta_medullo_logrank_p <- 1 - pchisq(
  openpbta_medullo_logrank$chisq,
  df = length(openpbta_medullo_logrank$n) - 1
)

openpbta_medullo_km <- ggsurvplot(
  openpbta_medullo_fit,
  data = openpbta_medullo_cd24,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  risk.table.title = "Number at risk",
  risk.table.height = 0.35,
  pval = paste0("Log-rank p = ", signif(openpbta_medullo_logrank_p, 3)),
  pval.coord = c(10, 0.10),
  conf.int = FALSE,
  palette = c("black", "#FF1493"),
  legend.title = "",
  legend.labs = c(
    "CD24 Low tumors",
    "CD24 High tumors"
  ),
  xlab = "Overall Survival (Months)",
  ylab = "Overall Survival Probability",
  ggtheme = theme_classic(base_size = 16),
  risk.table.y.text = TRUE,
  risk.table.y.text.col = FALSE,
  risk.table.fontsize = 5,
  tables.theme = theme_classic(base_size = 15)
)

openpbta_medullo_km$table <- openpbta_medullo_km$table +
  scale_y_discrete(
    labels = function(x) {
      x %>%
        str_remove("^CD24_group=")
    }
  ) +
  labs(x = "Overall Survival (Months)") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 14,
      color = c("black", "#FF1493")
    ),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 5, r = 20, b = 5, l = 120)
  )

openpbta_medullo_km

png(
  "OpenPBTA_medulloblastoma_CD24_KM_age21under.png",
  width = 2200,
  height = 1600,
  res = 200
)

print(openpbta_medullo_km)

dev.off()

pdf(
  "OpenPBTA_medulloblastoma_CD24_KM_age21under.pdf",
  width = 11,
  height = 8
)

print(openpbta_medullo_km)

dev.off()

openpbta_medullo_logrank_p

```
